Hakka Pronunciation: da3 pi4 on1 geu3 sim1
Chinese definition: 狗是吃屎的，放屁給牠聽讓牠安心以為很快有食物。比喻說空話。
English Definition: Lit. 'a fart to reassure the dog' (dogs eat dung, so a fart gives false hope of food). Means to pacify with empty promises; to make hollow assurances.

Hakka Pronunciation: da3 pi4 cong4 cok6 kem3
Chinese definition: 放屁碰上咳嗽，比喻巧合。
English Definition: Lit. 'farting and hitting a cough'. A coincidence; two unrelated things happening to align.

Hakka Pronunciation: da3 sa2 da3 cit5 cun4
Chinese definition: 打蛇要打中頭以下七寸的要害，比喻做事要有效率。
English Definition: When striking a snake, hit seven inches below the head (the vital point). Do things efficiently; strike at the key weakness.

Hakka Pronunciation: da3 si3 geu3 gong3 ga4
Chinese definition: 先把狗打死了才講價錢，當然是賣狗的吃虧了。
English Definition: Lit. 'haggling after the dog is already dead'. The seller is always at a disadvantage when the buyer kills first and negotiates later.

Hakka Pronunciation: dai4 geu3 du1 lan2 cim2
Chinese definition: 比喻很難找到。
English Definition: Even with a dog (to sniff it out) it would be hard to find. Describes something or someone extremely hard to find.

Hakka Pronunciation: fa1 pi1 kem3 gai1 lung1
Chinese definition: 花被蓋着雞籠。比喻金玉其外，敗絮其中。
English Definition: A beautiful quilt covering a chicken cage. Describes something that looks impressive on the outside but is worthless inside; gilded cage.

Hakka Pronunciation: fu2 ki2 tang4 sui3 hiong3
Chinese definition: 湖蜞是螞蟥，對水的聲音特別敏感，會馬上游過去。比喻馬上有反應。
English Definition: A leech hears the sound of water and rushes toward it immediately. Describes someone who reacts immediately to a stimulus; very responsive.

Hakka Pronunciation: gai1 ma2 dai4 gai1 zai3
Chinese definition: 母雞帶着小雞，比喻寫字不整齊，大小不一。
English Definition: A mother hen looking after her chicks. Describes a mother caring for her children, or someone escorting a group of dependants. Also: messy handwriting with characters of different sizes.

Hakka Pronunciation: gon3 geu3 m cut5 mun2
Chinese definition: 形容天氣太冷。
English Definition: Too cold to drive even a dog outside; describes extremely cold weather.

Hakka Pronunciation: gong1 fu2 mau2 luk5 ngiet6
Chinese definition: 出門天氣難料，要預備好禦寒衣物。
English Definition: Out on the road there is no June. Weather outdoors is unpredictable; always bring warm clothing when you travel.

Hakka Pronunciation: hau3 sim1 cok6 lui2 piak5
Chinese definition: 好心沒好報。
English Definition: Good intentions struck by lightning; no good deed goes unpunished.

Hakka Pronunciation: heu2 go1 da3 lot5 sok5
Chinese definition: 沒有繩子的猴子，表示很自由，沒人管。
English Definition: A monkey with no rope = completely free, with no one to control it. Describes a person with total freedom and no restraints.

Hakka Pronunciation: kiung2 go4 li1 mung2 zin4
Chinese definition: 口頭禪，表示很窮。傳說呂蒙正小時候很窮。
English Definition: Poorer than Lü Mengzheng (a Tang-era scholar who was extremely poor before becoming a prime minister). A common saying for extreme poverty.

Hakka Pronunciation: lau4 cu3 gi4 guk5 zung3
Chinese definition: 比喻小孩記掛住零食。
English Definition: A mouse obsessing over grain seeds. Describes a child fixated on snacks.

Hakka Pronunciation: m det5 gi2 gat5 sat5
Chinese definition: 沒他辦法。
English Definition: There is no way to deal with him; can't do anything about him.

Hakka Pronunciation: ma2 fung1 cien2 lan4 giok5
Chinese definition: 嘲笑人捆綁東西時胡亂捆綁，很快就鬆散。
English Definition: Leprosy wrapping up a lame leg. Mocking someone who ties things messily so that it falls apart instantly.

Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 si3 lang4 cut5 cong2
Chinese definition: 肚子沒有大便把腸子都拉出來，比喻不自量力。
English Definition: No dung but straining so hard the intestines come out. Overreaching; trying to do what is beyond one's capacity.

Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 coi4 sit6 bau3 fan4
Chinese definition: 客套話，沒菜就多添飯。
English Definition: No dishes, so eat plenty of rice. A polite host's saying; also: make do with what you have.

Hakka Pronunciation: oi4 si3 m su3 piang4
Chinese definition: 該死的時候會死得很突然。比喻生死無常。
English Definition: One dies suddenly when fated to; no need to fall ill first. Life and death are unpredictable.

Hakka Pronunciation: pi4 gung1 pak6 hong3 hong3
Chinese definition: 一鼻子灰。比喻沒有結果，白花氣力。
English Definition: Nose all covered in ash and dust. Came away empty-handed; wasted effort with no result.

Hakka Pronunciation: sim1 gon1 lau1 zoi4 gong3
Chinese definition: 自言自語或者自己在想。
English Definition: Talking with one's heart and mouth together; talking to oneself; thinking out loud or muttering inwardly.

Hakka Pronunciation: sit6 do1 ciau4 m lan4
Chinese definition: 不能太貪心。
English Definition: Eating too much to chew properly. Don't be greedy; biting off more than you can chew.

Hakka Pronunciation: song4 liu3 dap5 ha1 liu3
Chinese definition: 穿衣服把紐扣搭錯了。
English Definition: Buttoning up the shirt wrong, fastening one button to the wrong hole. Getting things mixed up; being in a muddle.

Hakka Pronunciation: tai4 sui3 tui1 ngiu2 si3
Chinese definition: 比喻人動作緩慢。
English Definition: Big floodwater pushing cow dung slowly along. Describes someone who moves very slowly.

Hakka Pronunciation: vo2 gon3 kem3 zin1 zu1
Chinese definition: 外表不好看但是裏面很貴重。
English Definition: Rice straw covering pearls; plain and humble on the outside but precious inside.

Hakka Pronunciation: yau4 po2 ya3 gai1 zai3
Chinese definition: 小孩子的遊戲。老鷹抓小雞。
English Definition: A hawk snatching chicks. The children's game of eagle-catches-chick.

Hakka Pronunciation: za4 mung3 sit6 gai1 bi3
Chinese definition: 裝傻而佔便宜。
English Definition: Playing dumb to grab the chicken leg. Getting an advantage by pretending ignorance.

Hakka Pronunciation: zoi4 ngang4 si3 fut5 lem2
Chinese definition: 嘴巴硬屁股軟，比喻虎頭蛇尾。又作屎頭硬屎尾腍。
English Definition: Mouth hard, backside soft. Tiger head snake tail; a strong start but a weak finish. Also written 屎頭硬屎尾腍.

Hakka Pronunciation: zu3 do1 ngo4 si3 ya2
Chinese definition: 孩子太多，生活艱苦。 【13】五字熟語 二維碼13
English Definition: Too many children starve the father. A large family leads to hardship.

Hakka Pronunciation: bak5 ziang1 m dong4 yit5 suk5
Chinese definition: 沒有人脈光靠聰明不行。
English Definition: A hundred talents are no match for one well-placed connection. Guanxi (social connections) beats raw ability.

Hakka Pronunciation: bun1 sit6 ngin2 con1 siu3 zi3
Chinese definition: 分派食物的人自己沒分，只好吮手指。表示沒有徇私。
English Definition: The one who divides the food gets none herself – she can only lick her fingers. Impartial distribution means personal sacrifice.

Hakka Pronunciation: bang1 teu2 la1 mau1 cut5 se4
Chinese definition: 同胞兄弟姐妹。
English Definition: Born from the same womb. Full siblings; brothers and sisters by blood.

Hakka Pronunciation: bok5 hoi1 pi2 du1 hiau3 tiau4
Chinese definition: （指人）性格很厲害，狡猾。
English Definition: Still jumping even after the skin is stripped off. Describes someone extremely cunning and slippery.

Hakka Pronunciation: da3 m si3 sap6 m lan4
Chinese definition: 打不死煮不爛，比喻非常頑固的性格。
English Definition: Can't be beaten to death or boiled to mush. Describes an extremely stubborn, hardened personality.

Hakka Pronunciation: cai3 dau3 vu4 hap5 dong4 sa2
Chinese definition: 形容沒有膽量，很容易被嚇到。
English Definition: Stepping on a taro husk and thinking it's a snake. Describes a person who is timid and easily frightened.

Hakka Pronunciation: gai1 zi4 giok5 ha1 kiet6 sit6
Chinese definition: 一隻雞在雞籠底下找食物。比喻在自己老家騙鄉親。
English Definition: A chicken scratching for food right under its own roost. Describes cheating or taking advantage of people in your own hometown.

Hakka Pronunciation: heu2 m heu2 geu3 m geu3
Chinese definition: （指人舉止或衣服）不像話、不倫不類。
English Definition: Neither monkey nor dog. Describes behaviour or clothing that is inappropriate; neither here nor there; a mess.

Hakka Pronunciation: sa2 go4 zang4 loi2 da3 gun4
Chinese definition: 賊過興兵。
English Definition: Only grabbing the stick after the snake has already passed. Locking the stable door after the horse has bolted.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 fut5 lak5 du1 he4 dam3
Chinese definition: 嘲笑別人沒膽量。
English Definition: Even the drops from the backside are all bile/gall. Mockingly says someone has absolutely no courage.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 teu2 ngang4 si3 mui1 lem2
Chinese definition: 虎頭蛇尾，又作啜硬屎窟腍。
English Definition: Hard at the head of the stool, soft at the tail. Tiger head, snake tail; starts strong but ends weakly. Also written 啜硬屎窟腍.

Hakka Pronunciation: su3 keu3 m dong4 zu4 zeu3
Chinese definition: 靠自己。使喚別人不如自己動手。
English Definition: Telling others with your mouth is no match for going yourself. Better to do it yourself than to delegate.

Hakka Pronunciation: teu1 dau3 gai1 du1 hiam2 seu4
Chinese definition: 比喻貪心。
English Definition: Stealing a chicken but finding it too thin. Greediness that is never satisfied.

Hakka Pronunciation: teu1 sit6 m hiau3 giau3 zoi4
Chinese definition: 犯事留下線索、證據。 【14】六字熟語 二維碼14
English Definition: Stealing food without wiping the mouth. Committing a wrongdoing and leaving evidence behind.

Hakka Pronunciation: an4 ziang1 du1 sit6 ham2 ng teu2
Chinese definition: 再聰明到頭來還是吃虧，又作貓更精都係食鹹魚頭。
English Definition: Even the cleverest person still ends up eating salted fish head (the cheapest part). No matter how smart, you'll still face hardship.

Hakka Pronunciation: ban4 fun4 se4 long2 ban4 fun4 zu3
Chinese definition: 女婿就像半個兒子一樣。
English Definition: A son-in-law is half a son. Describes the status of a son-in-law in the family.

Hakka Pronunciation: bui4 sui3 zang4 cung1 det5 hau3 ca2
Chinese definition: 開水才能沖到好茶。意思是工欲善其事，必先利其器。
English Definition: Only truly boiling water can brew good tea. The right tools and conditions are necessary for quality results.

Hakka Pronunciation: cau3 mang3 m gam3 liau2 gai1 gung1
Chinese definition: 懂得量力而為，不越級挑戰。
English Definition: A grasshopper doesn't dare provoke a rooster. Know your limits; don't pick fights with those far stronger.

Hakka Pronunciation: cien1 bai3 bun4 cot6 mau2 bai3 tung2
Chinese definition: 千擺，一千次。笨拙，吃虧的經驗。人每次吃虧方式不一樣。
English Definition: A thousand instances of misfortune, not one the same. Every mistake has its own unique circumstances.

Hakka Pronunciation: di1 det5 tien1 gong1 m lai2 ngiau4
Chinese definition: 早知道結果就不用後悔了。
English Definition: If you knew daylight was coming, you wouldn't have wet the bed. Hindsight comes too late.

Hakka Pronunciation: diau4 giang3 du1 oi4 teu3 ha4 hi4
Chinese definition: 怎樣忙碌也要休息一下。
English Definition: Even a person being hanged needs to pause for breath. No matter how busy, you must rest.

Hakka Pronunciation: do1 cung1 ma2 bu4 gak5 cung2 lon1
Chinese definition: 多穿一件什麼衣服都會暖一點。
English Definition: Every additional layer of coarse cloth adds more warmth. Every little bit helps.

Hakka Pronunciation: hau3 von3 da3 hoi1 ngau2 von3 coi1
Chinese definition: 好的碗打碎了，但是不好看的還在。比喻事與願違，或者該死的不死。
English Definition: The good bowl is broken; the ugly one survives. The worthy die young while the mediocre persist; things go contrary to hope.

Hakka Pronunciation: gak5 li2 suk5 po2 fan4 go4 hiong1
Chinese definition: 自家的飯不如鄰家的好。也比喻看自己不順眼，覺得別人的才好。
English Definition: The neighbour aunty's rice smells better. The grass is always greener on the other side.

Hakka Pronunciation: geu3 sit6 lo4 mi3 mau2 det5 bien4
Chinese definition: 狗屎不能消化糯米的。比喻人食古不化。
English Definition: A dog eating glutinous rice: it passes through unchanged. Stubbornly set in one's ways; unable to adapt.

Hakka Pronunciation: kon4 si4 geu3 gu3 diau3 si3 miau4
Chinese definition: 看着狗把貓強姦了也不加援手。比喻見死不救。
English Definition: Watching a dog assault a cat without intervening. Standing idly by while someone is harmed; seeing a wrong and doing nothing.

Hakka Pronunciation: lau3 po2 si3 hoi1 lau3 po2 coi1
Chinese definition: 老婆死了，過不久就再娶。指夫妻的關係比兄弟、父母隨便很多。
English Definition: The wife dies; soon there is a new wife. Husband-wife bonds are weaker and more replaceable than parent-child bonds.

Hakka Pronunciation: lau4 cu4 m liu2 gak5 ya4 liong2
Chinese definition: 老鼠是不會計劃的，有多少就吃多少。嘲笑不會計劃的人。
English Definition: A mouse does not save overnight food. Mocking those who live for today with no plan for tomorrow.

Hakka Pronunciation: lau4 fu3 du1 hiau3 duk5 muk5 soi4
Chinese definition: 老虎都會打瞌睡，比喻更精明的人都會犯錯誤。
English Definition: Even tigers take naps. Even the most capable person makes mistakes.

Hakka Pronunciation: lau4 fu3 m sit6 gu1 hon2 ngiuk5
Chinese definition: 老虎不吃吝嗇的人。比喻騙錢的人不會向吝嗇的人打主意。
English Definition: A tiger doesn't eat the flesh of a miser. Con artists don't target stingy people.

Hakka Pronunciation: m sang1 m sang1 da3 lan4 ang1
Chinese definition: 平時很低調的人有時候會嚇你一跳。
English Definition: Quietly broke the jar. A quiet person who can suddenly surprise you with an unexpected action.

Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 gien4 go4 tai4 sa2 o1 si3
Chinese definition: 屙屎是拉屎，比喻沒有見過大場面。
English Definition: Never seen a big snake defecate. Describes someone who has never seen the wider world; naive.

Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 piang4 mau2 tung4 dong4 fat5 coi2
Chinese definition: 健康就是財富，不奢求大富大貴。
English Definition: No illness and no pain is as good as being rich. Health is the greatest wealth.

Hakka Pronunciation: miau4 cau4 fan4 zen4 zung3 sin2 geu3
Chinese definition: 飯甑，飯桶。比喻為別人白忙，為他人做嫁衣。
English Definition: A cat stealing from the rice pot ends up benefiting the dog. Working hard for others' benefit; doing all the work while someone else takes the gain.

Hakka Pronunciation: sau1 ca2 ngiet6 fan4 lang1 gim1 ga1
Chinese definition: 茶和飯要趁熱吃，但南瓜最好放涼才吃。
English Definition: Drink tea hot, eat rice hot, but eat pumpkin cold. Different things have their optimal conditions.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 cut5 zang4 loi2 tiau1 bun4 gong1
Chinese definition: 便急才去挖糞坑。臨渴掘井。
English Definition: Needing to defecate only when you start digging the cesspit. Leaving things to the very last moment; procrastinating.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 fut5 mau2 cung2 ngiam1 hien3 zon4
Chinese definition: 屁股沒有蟲子，撿一條蚯蚓去鑚。比喻自找麻煩。
English Definition: No worm in the backside, so you pick up a centipede to insert. Inviting trouble upon yourself unnecessarily.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 fut5 zeu3 hoi1 zung4 ngin2 vui4
Chinese definition: 屁股一離開就是人人都可以坐的位子。
English Definition: Once a backside leaves a seat, it becomes available to everyone. No position is held forever; once you vacate it, it belongs to all.

Hakka Pronunciation: sim1 gon1 m hau3 ngan3 sang1 fai4
Chinese definition: 心肝，心腸。心腸不好，眼睛就會打壞主意。
English Definition: When the heart is corrupt, the eyes get wicked ideas. A corrupt nature leads to corrupt thoughts and actions.

Hakka Pronunciation: son4 miang4 m liang2 ci2 ga1 zet5
Chinese definition: 自己的命不好，算命的也不會算，只好自己折算一下。
English Definition: When the fortune-teller can't predict your fate, you estimate it yourself. Making do without expert guidance.

Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 ga1 pien2 yi2 liong3 ga1 cok6
Chinese definition: 一件事情雙方都撿到便宜。現代說法叫“雙贏”。
English Definition: One household's bargain benefits both parties. A win-win situation; modern equivalent is '雙贏'.

Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 tiau2 miau4 mau1 sam1 tiau2 cung2
Chinese definition: 農村養的貓很髒，毛上面有很多蟲子和病菌，所以要小心不要碰到或吃到。
English Definition: One cat hair, three worms. Village cats are filthy and full of bacteria; don't touch them or eat near them.

Hakka Pronunciation: zau3 si3 ya2 ngiong2 mau2 gau1 zau1
Chinese definition: 父母早死，沒有教養。用來罵沒有教養的人。
English Definition: Parents died early, so no one taught manners. Used to mock someone who has no upbringing or manners.

Hakka Pronunciation: zo4 si3 m geu4 bu3 tien1 con1
Chinese definition: 怎樣做都補不了天上的大洞。比喻白費努力。 【15】七字熟語 二維碼15
English Definition: Working yourself to death still wouldn't be enough to patch the sky. Describes futile effort; no amount of effort can fix the problem.

Hakka Pronunciation: a1 gon1 hau3 zo4 m det5 yit5 se4 go4
Chinese definition: 懶惰過日子很容易，但要過一輩子很難。
English Definition: Easy to be lazy, but you can't live like that forever. A lazy lifestyle is enjoyable but unsustainable.

Hakka Pronunciation: an4 hau3 lung2 cong2 du1 m dong4 geu3 deu4
Chinese definition: 出遠門睡不慣，還是自己的窩最好。
English Definition: Even the finest dragon bed is no match for your own dog kennel. There's no place like home.

Hakka Pronunciation: fong4 gau1 kong2 miau4 fong4 dai1 kong2 geu3
Chinese definition: 惶（ kōng）是怕的意思，把食物放哪裏都怕給貓狗夠到。比喻畏首畏尾。
English Definition: Put the food high and fear the cat; put it low and fear the dog. Can't win either way; constantly afraid.

Hakka Pronunciation: ha2 ma2 go4 tai4 han2 he4 goi1 go4 tai4
Chinese definition: 蛤蟆大還是牠的下巴大？比喻不分主次。
English Definition: Is the frog bigger or is its chin bigger? Not knowing what matters most; losing perspective on what is primary.

Hakka Pronunciation: m hau3 ki1 fu4 ze1 ma2 mau2 len4 gu1
Chinese definition: 奀嫲，瘦小女孩。嬭菇，乳房。比喻人不可以貌相。
English Definition: Don't bully a thin girl just because she has no breasts. Don't judge by appearances; don't underestimate people.

客家汉字: 盲眼嘅恅過光眼嘅食好滴
Hakka Pronunciation: mang2 ngan3 e4 lau1 go4 gong1 ngan3 e4 sit6 hau3 dit5
Chinese definition: 別人對你好，但你卻去猜疑。
English Definition: The blind person assumes the sighted person eats better. Suspecting people who are actually treating you well.

客家汉字: 冇食過豬肉也看$過豬毛
Hakka Pronunciation: mau2 sit6 go4 zu1 ngiuk5 du1 kon4 go4 zu1 mau1
Chinese definition: 比喻見識廣博。
English Definition: Haven't eaten pork but have seen pig hair. Having extensive knowledge and experience even without direct participation.

Hakka Pronunciation: oi4 si3 du1 m zang1 ai4 ban4 ya4 miang4
Chinese definition: 反正都要死了，多了半夜的命用途不大。
English Definition: Destined to die, what use is an extra half-night of life? Accepting the inevitable; not grasping at a little more time.

Hakka Pronunciation: sa2 m ngau1 ngi2 lau1 go4 vong2 sien1
Chinese definition: 給你欺負不反抗，你就以為很好欺負。
English Definition: The snake doesn't bite you so you assume it's as harmless as an eel. Mistaking tolerance for weakness; taking advantage of someone's patience.

Hakka Pronunciation: san1 zu1 co4 cau2 ok5 go4 lau4 fu3
Chinese definition: 山豬，野豬。比喻猛虎不如地頭蛇。
English Definition: A wild boar defending its den is fiercer than a tiger. A local is more formidable in their own territory than any outsider.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 cut5 fu4 teu2 dai4 zang4 loi2 da3 git5
Chinese definition: 便急才發現褲頭帶打結，比喻倒霉極了。
English Definition: Urgently needing to go, only to find the trouser strings are knotted. The worst possible timing; everything going wrong at once.

Hakka Pronunciation: si3 lau4 cu3 yiu1 mang2 miau4 gung1 loi2 to1
Chinese definition: 比喻一個人無論如何都會找到結婚對象。又作“醜人自有醜人愛”。
English Definition: Even a dead mouse will have a blind tomcat come to drag it away. Everyone finds someone to marry eventually. Also: 醜人自有醜人愛.

Hakka Pronunciation: su3 moi4 zai3 ta4 go4 zu3 ngin2 po2
Chinese definition: 使妹仔，婢女。比喻主次不分。
English Definition: The maidservant has more power than the mistress. The servant has authority over the employer; priorities completely inverted.

Hakka Pronunciation: yit5 bak5 gi4 dong4 ngi2 ng3 sip6 sung1
Chinese definition: （人家的話）當耳邊風，不聽別人的勸告 【16】八個字以上單句或短語 二維碼16
English Definition: One hundred words are treated as fifty pairs (i.e., ignored). Not listening to advice; letting words go in one ear and out the other.
